label: Rocks from grid
description: Generates rock edifices and roofs from the elevation grid, then scatters mineable ore lumps.

maxMineableValue.label: Max mineable value
maxMineableValue.description: Private field. Maximum base market value for mineables scattered by this step.

ignoreMaxIfGravship.label: Ignore max if gravship
ignoreMaxIfGravship.description: Private field. When true, maxMineableValue is ignored on maps created by gravship landing.

overrideBlotchesPer10kCells.label: Override blotches per 10k cells
overrideBlotchesPer10kCells.description: Private field. When set, overrides the biome-derived ore blotch density with this fixed value.
